summary: R1 plan: widen SUPPORTED dtype/weight_dtype to {fp32,bf16,bf8b}, fp32_dest_acc_en to {True,False}. Program descriptor: (a) interm format = fp32 if acc else output dtype (matmul_block last-block pack reconfig gated on acc, so interm must match out when acc=False), (b) dtype-aware L1 footprint, (c) effective compute config clamping HiFi4->HiFi2 for bf16/bf8b inputs to dodge #38306 K-accumulator corruption on wormhole_b0. Keep {fp32,acc=False} EXCLUSION. Probe bf16+HiFi4 corruption empirically.
